# ADR NNNN: Decision Title

Status: Proposed

## Context

What problem or decision is this addressing?

## Decision

What did we decide?

## Rationale

Why is this the right decision now?

## Consequences

What becomes easier, harder, riskier, or constrained?

## Alternatives Considered

- Alternative 1.
- Alternative 2.

## Revisit When

What conditions should cause this decision to be revisited?
